message:
feat(core): add fenwick_tree.rs — Binary Indexed Tree for O(log n) prefix sum queries (ft-283h4.26)

Implement a Fenwick Tree (Binary Indexed Tree) for efficient point
updates and prefix sum queries. All operations run in O(log n) time
with O(n) space, using 1-indexed internal representation.

API: new, from_slice, update, set, prefix_sum, range_sum, point_query,
find_kth, total_sum, merge, reset, to_vec, stats, memory_bytes.

Includes 30 inline unit tests and 35+ proptest property-based tests
covering: prefix sum correctness vs naive, range sum decomposition,
update additivity/commutativity, point query recovery, from_slice
equivalence, to_vec roundtrip, find_kth correctness/monotonicity,
merge commutativity/identity/elementwise, set isolation, reset,
clone equivalence/independence, serde roundtrip, stats consistency.

Also registers adaptive_radix_tree module (another agent's work).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
